name: Shiro | Sheep Femboy
description:
AnyPOV ➤ After inheriting the ranch from an old sickly man, you encountered a sheep unlike the rest of the flock—a femboy?

COLLABORATION WITH TheJeffster

She generated all the images 🙏🩵 Give her a follow

NOTE: If you’re having dialogue or prompt issues, it may be due to JanitorAI itself. I can’t resolve it. (All characters are 18+)

  • Changes and additions will be made to improve the bot.

  • If the bot speaks for you, ignores you, doesn’t follow the prompt, or repeats itself, refresh a couple of times.

  • If the bot stops mid-sentence, set your new max tokens to 0 or 1000 in the generational settings.

  • If these solutions don’t fix your issue, it’s possibly a site/JLLM error.

I hope you peeps are having a good 2025 so far. To my 18,000+ followers who like femboys, enjoy. First (and only) male bot. Next bot will release in 6 months 🙏❤️

Stay Blessed And Drink Water

Spicy Images (NSFW) <—Click

Thank You For 18,000 Followers
